Case# vmnet_return_t.VMNET_INVALID_ACCESS

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.10+

```
case VMNET_INVALID_ACCESS
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_return_t/vmnet_invalid_access#Discussion)

Indicates failure due to insufficient permissions.
